# ozDNA Knowledge Bundle

Structured content for agents. Read these files instead of scraping the site.

**ozDNA** is the brand of Findbelow Ventures for verifiability software. Two products:

| Product | One line | Page |
|---------|----------|------|
| **ComplyDNA** | Compliance LLM for Turkish financial regulation — every answer carries inline statutory citations | https://ozdna.com/products/comply/ |
| **OriginDNA** | Content provenance infrastructure for EU AI Act Article 50 content marking — waitlist open | https://ozdna.com/products/origin/ |

## Files

| File | Topic |
|------|-------|
| [overview.md](./overview.md) | Brand positioning, the two products |
| [complydna.md](./complydna.md) | ComplyDNA — coverage, method, deployment |

## Web

# FILE: knowledge/overview.md
---
---
title: ozDNA Overview
tags: [brand, positioning]
related: [complydna.md, origindna.md]
---

# ozDNA — Verifiable by design

ozDNA (Findbelow Ventures) builds software for one problem: **trusting what AI produces**.
Every product follows the same principle — an output must carry the evidence needed to
verify it. No claim without a source; no content without an origin.

## The two products

**ComplyDNA** (RegTech, Türkçe) — a compliance LLM for Turkish financial regulation
(MASAK communiqués, AML/CFT laws 5549 & 6415, KVKK). Every sentence in every answer
carries an inline statutory citation in the form `[TEBLİĞ / Madde]`, so compliance teams
can verify the exact article behind each claim. Cloud API or fully on-premises.
Status: early access / pilot program.

**OriginDNA** (content provenance, global) — infrastructure that gives every image a
"DNA": a cryptographic signature at creation (open C2PA standard), a timestamp anchored
in a public, independently verifiable record, and a perceptual fingerprint that survives
metadata stripping. Built for EU AI Act Article 50 content marking (applies Aug 2, 2026;
grace for existing GenAI systems ends Dec 2, 2026). Status: pre-launch, waitlist open.

## What ozDNA is not

- Not an AI-text detector or humanizer — no detection-evasion products exist under this brand.
- OriginDNA is provenance, not AI detection; it has no token and holds no user funds.

---
# FILE: knowledge/complydna.md
---
---
title: ComplyDNA
tags: [regtech, compliance, llm, masak, kvkk, aml]
related: [overview.md, pricing.md, contact.md]
---

# ComplyDNA — Türk mevzuatına özel uyum LLM'i

ComplyDNA, Türk mevzuatı (MASAK tebliğleri, AML/CFT kanunları, KVKK) üzerine eğitilmiş
bir uyum LLM'idir. Her yanıtını `[TEBLİĞ / Madde]` biçiminde satır içi kaynak künyesiyle
verir; yanıtın dayandığı mevzuat parçası cümle düzeyinde doğrulanabilir.

ComplyDNA is a compliance LLM for Turkish financial regulation, answering compliance
questions with inline statutory citations in the form [COMMUNIQUE / Article].

## Kapsam / Coverage

- 5549 — Suç Gelirlerinin Aklanmasının Önlenmesi Hakkında Kanun
- 6415 — Terörizmin Finansmanının Önlenmesi Hakkında Kanun
- 6698 — Kişisel Verilerin Korunması Kanunu (KVKK)
- MASAK tebliğ ve genelgeleri, Tedbirler Yönetmeliği
- Kripto varlık hizmet sağlayıcı (VASP/CASP) düzenlemeleri

## Yöntem / Method

1. Mevzuat korpusu madde düzeyinde parçalanır, yürürlük metadata'sıyla etiketlenir
2. Anlamsal indeks üzerinden geri getirme (TR/EN çift sorgu)
3. Model referans biçimini ve mevzuat dilini ince ayarla öğrenir
4. Yanıt: kaynak künyeli, denetlenebilir — golden-set ile her sürümde ölçülür

## Dağıtım / Deployment

- Bulut API / web arayüzü, veya tam kurum içi (on-prem) — model ve indeks kurumda
- Müşteri verisi model eğitiminde kullanılmaz

## Not

Çıktılar bilgilendirme amaçlıdır, hukuki tavsiye değildir.

Page: https://ozdna.com/products/comply/

---
# FILE: knowledge/origindna.md
---
---
title: OriginDNA
tags: [content-provenance, eu-ai-act, c2pa, article-50, proof-of-origin]
related: [overview.md, pricing.md, contact.md]
---

# OriginDNA — Proof of Origin

OriginDNA is **content provenance infrastructure**. Every image gets a DNA:

1. **Signature** — a cryptographic signature attached at creation, following the open
   C2PA standard: who made it, with what tool, when. Tampering breaks the signature.
2. **Timestamp** — the image's fingerprint is anchored into a public, append-only record;
   anyone can independently confirm "this existed by this date" without an OriginDNA
   account.
3. **Fingerprint** — a perceptual fingerprint stored at registration, so stripped,
   resized or recompressed copies can be matched back to the registered original.

## Why now — the regulatory clock

- **Aug 2, 2026** — EU AI Act Article 50 applies; California SB 942 takes effect the same day.
  Generative-AI providers must mark AI-generated content in machine-readable form.
- **Dec 2, 2026** — grace period ends for GenAI systems already on the market.
- **Feb 2, 2027** — interoperable detection/marking requirements tighten.

## Who it's for

1. GenAI apps needing EU AI Act marking — self-serve API (primary)
2. Marketplace sellers & creators (Etsy requires AI disclosure since Jan 2026) — badge plans
3. Newsrooms & fact-checking organizations — free, forever
4. Legal / enterprise evidence capture (TR/MENA) — later

## Honest status

- Pre-launch. MVP ships October 2026; launch targets the Dec 2, 2026 compliance wave.
  Waitlist: https://ozdna.com/products/origin/#waitlist
- v1 = images only (JPG/PNG). Video/audio later.
- OriginDNA signs to the open C2PA standard but is **not yet** a certified member of the
  C2PA conformance program and does not claim "trusted Content Credentials" status.
  Verification runs through OriginDNA's own public verify page and public record.
- No token exists or is planned. No user funds are ever held. This is SaaS.
- OriginDNA is provenance, **not** AI detection — it does not classify content as
  AI-generated after the fact.

Page: https://ozdna.com/products/origin/

---
# FILE: knowledge/pricing.md
---
---
title: Pricing
tags: [pricing, plans]
related: [contact.md]
---

# Pricing

## ComplyDNA — early access

Pricing is set per institution during the pilot program (regulatory scope + usage volume).

- **Pilot** — fixed-fee 4-week POC with an institution-specific golden-set evaluation
- **Team** — annual subscription, seat-based + monthly query quota, cloud API or web UI
- **Enterprise / On-prem** — annual license; model and index run inside your infrastructure

Contact: hello@ozdna.com (subject: ComplyDNA)

## OriginDNA — pre-launch (waitlist)

Planned launch pricing (October 2026 MVP, subject to change until launch):

- **Compliance API** for GenAI apps — self-serve, from **$49/mo**
- **Seller / creator badge** — from **$5/mo**
- **Newsrooms & fact-checkers** — free, forever
- Legal / enterprise evidence capture — later, priced separately

Waitlist: https://ozdna.com/products/origin/#waitlist

# Contact

## ComplyDNA

Early-access pilot program is open for Turkish compliance teams (banks, financial
institutions, VASPs). Email hello@ozdna.com with subject "ComplyDNA".

## OriginDNA

Pre-launch. Segmented waitlist (GenAI apps / sellers & creators / newsrooms &
fact-checkers / legal & enterprise): https://ozdna.com/products/origin/#waitlist

## Company

- Email: hello@ozdna.com
- Findbelow Ventures · © 2026
